prompt:
Convert the following idea note into a structured JSON document.

Return ONLY valid JSON with these exact fields:
- title (string): catchy, descriptive title for the idea
- date (string or null): when the idea was recorded
- problem_statement (string): what problem this idea solves
- proposed_solution (string): the core idea/solution
- potential_impact (string): why this matters, who benefits
- required_resources (list of strings): what is needed to execute
- next_steps (list of strings): immediate actions to explore further
- tags (list of strings): 3-5 relevant keywords

Be creative but structured. Capture the spirit of the idea.

Note:
{raw_note}
